'''ngajuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hider|hider]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hider|hider]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngajuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæjichith|ngæjichith]] || [[word:ngæjichij|ngæjichij]] || [[word:ngæjichish|ngæjichish]] || [[word:ngæjichi|ngæjichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngajujuchuth|ngajujuchuth]] || [[word:ngajujuchuj|ngajujuchuj]] || [[word:ngajujuchush|ngajujuchush]] || [[word:ngajujuchu|ngajujuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngajuchuth|ngajuchuth]] || [[word:ngajuchuj|ngajuchuj]] || [[word:ngajuchush|ngajuchush]] || [[word:ngajuchu|ngajuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngajufchuth|ngajufchuth]] || [[word:ngajufchuj|ngajufchuj]] || [[word:ngajufchush|ngajufchush]] || [[word:ngajufchuf|ngajufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngajuchuthu|ngajuchuthu]] || [[word:ngajuchuju|ngajuchuju]] || [[word:ngajuchushu|ngajuchushu]] || [[word:ngajuchuku|ngajuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngajuchuth|ngajuchuth]] || [[word:ngajuchuj|ngajuchuj]] || [[word:ngajuchush|ngajuchush]] || [[word:ngajuchu|ngajuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngajuchuthul|ngajuchuthul]] || [[word:ngajuchujul|ngajuchujul]] || [[word:ngajuchushul|ngajuchushul]] || [[word:ngajuchukul|ngajuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngajuchuthuthu|ngajuchuthuthu]] || [[word:ngajuchujuju|ngajuchujuju]] || [[word:ngajuchushushu|ngajuchushushu]] || [[word:ngajuchuku|ngajuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngajuchuthun|ngajuchuthun]] || [[word:ngajuchujun|ngajuchujun]] || [[word:ngajuchushun|ngajuchushun]] || [[word:ngajuchukun|ngajuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngajuchuthuoro|ngajuchuthuoro]] || [[word:ngajuchujuoro|ngajuchujuoro]] || [[word:ngajuchushuoro|ngajuchushuoro]] || [[word:ngajuchukuoro|ngajuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
